比利連得拳王啟發轉食素

【now.com體育】阿仙奴右閘比利連加入素食行列，他自言是受英國退役重量級拳王希耶的啟發。

比利連（Hector Bellerin）透露已轉為食素1年：「當年紀越來越大，我食得越來越健康，甚至發現根本沒有需要食肉。我問過很多食素的運動員如希耶（David Haye），本來我的目標只是3個月，之後發現身體有重大改變，就決定全面食素。」

不少人都以為放棄肉類食物，對營養需求極大的運動員會有越影響，比利連就表示，食素只會帶來好處：「我在比賽後的肌肉問題，以及長期傷患，現時都康復得更快，為甚麼我要放棄？」

今季，比利連的右閘位置將受到新兵瑞士國腳列治史迪拿的威脅，而且領隊也換上艾美利，他坦言所有事跟雲加時代都不一樣：「兩位領隊的執教哲學完全不同，我們要努力習慣，了解新帥希望我們如何操練及比賽。」

比利連（Hector Bellerin）透露已轉為食素1年：「當年紀越來越大，我食得越來越健康，甚至發現根本沒有需要食肉。我問過很多食素的運動員如希耶（David Haye），本來我的目標只是3個月，之後發現身體有重大改變，就決定全面食素。」

不少人都以為放棄肉類食物，對營養需求極大的運動員會有越影響，比利連就表示，食素只會帶來好處：「我在比賽後的肌肉問題，以及長期傷患，現時都康復得更快，為甚麼我要放棄？」

今季，比利連的右閘位置將受到新兵瑞士國腳列治史迪拿的威脅，而且領隊也換上艾美利，他坦言所有事跟雲加時代都不一樣：「兩位領隊的執教哲學完全不同，我們要努力習慣，了解新帥希望我們如何操練及比賽。」
叫佢食屎算啦，家下仲跑得慢過我

Emery on Ramsey contract and N’Zonzi rumours

on Aaron Ramsey’s contract situation…

It’s one question for the club and another for the player. I am very, very concentrated and my focus is thinking everyday about the training, the players and the match on Saturday against Lazio, and then against Manchester City.

on if he’s thought about what he’ll do if Ramsey doesn’t sign…

I think my opinion is clear, I want him to be with us, but then it’s one question for the player and the club. My opinion is professional and is in the interest of the team.

on the team’s performance…

We are very happy with the 90 minutes because I think the performance was getting better throughout the match after the first goal. But I think it’s also good because in this moment we need to stay together and react to these moments in the game, and then I think we controlled he match with possession, had good positioning on the pitch and created lots of chances which led to the goal. For that, I think the performance tonight was good and it will help us in our preparation for the start of the competition. After this, it’s clear that the problems tonight were Aaron Ramsey – but that’s not a big issue – and then Kolasinac because he’s injured his leg. We’re waiting for the medical analysis to find out what this injury is.

on whether he’s interested in N’Zonzi…

At the moment I’m very happy with the players that are here with us. We also have others still to come, like Nacho Monreal, Lucas and Xhaka, who will start to get minutes on Saturday. I am telling you that we’re speaking inside and we are OK. There is only a possibility that we sign someone if it’s a good opportunity.

on how his centre forwards played…

I am very happy with their positioning off the ball and breaking the opposition’s lines. Then for the finishing, we want to continue on improving that, but we have very, very good strikers in Lacazette, Aubameyang and Nketiah. For me, the best situation tonight is that our striker took his chance tonight and grabbed the goal.

Unai Emery is confident that Aaron Ramsey does not have “a big problem” after he was a late omission from the team to face Chelsea.

“He has one little muscular pain and we decided not to start him in the match because it’s maybe a big risk for him,” said Unai Emery.

“But I’m waiting for the medical analysis and I don’t think it will be a big problem.”

Matteo Guendouzi is an interesting prospect, but …

He certainly seems capable of finding passes between the lines, and he did try and open things up a bit which I liked. The repeated cross-field passes don’t interest me that much, any professional worth tuppence should be able to float a ball under no pressure to a teammate on the wings, but what caught my eye a couple of times were passes in tight areas which found an Arsenal man higher up the pitch, and his desire to move the ball quickly. It showed good vision and the ability to move the ball with pace and precision was good to see.

All the same, he’s far from flawless, and I suspect in a more competitive environment his tendency to turn on the ball – and it’s pretty easy to telegraph which way he’s going to go – will prove costly, especially as he’s not always going to get the free kick he wants. That’s something that needs work, fast, if he’s going to play Premier League football.

托雷拉可能會成為阿仙奴下賽季五位隊長之一

《每日鏡報》消息稱，在加盟阿仙奴以來，托雷拉已經給大家留下了深刻的印象，這名烏拉圭球星今夏從森多利亞轉會來到了阿仙奴。而下賽季他甚至有可能會成為阿仙奴的五名隊長之一。

艾美利此前已經表態稱新賽季他需要五名隊長，藍斯、奧斯爾、施治都已經在季前賽戴上了隊長袖標，不過迄今為止他還沒有任命一名新的隊長。

梅迪薩卡是上賽季阿仙奴的隊長，但上賽季他沒有獲得什麼出場機會，他也已經在賽季結束後投身阿仙奴的青訓工作。而哥斯尼目前處於養傷階段，他也是球隊的隊長人選之一。倫敦足球消息稱，托雷拉將會成為艾美利任命的球隊新人隊長人選。

對此，《太陽報》發文質疑摩帥：曼聯都給你花了3億英鎊了，你到底還有什麼可抱怨的？

　　《太陽報》在文章中表示：「儘管摩連奴總是喊著‘我缺乏資金’，但是事實上，從他接手曼聯教練以來，曼聯在英超6強（曼聯、曼城、利物浦、車路士、阿仙奴、熱刺）中淨支出排名第二。從2016年夏天到現在，曼聯已經投入了3.86億英鎊用於收購，賣出球員收回8050萬英鎊，淨投入達到3.02億英鎊。」

　　「這一數字僅次於曼城投入的3.88億英鎊，這也意味著，只要曼聯再做一筆大買賣（比如買下麥佳亞或者米連高域），他們就能與曼城的淨支出持平。」

　　「而且，他們肯定會在賽季前無視所有人的期望，毫不含糊地說，曼聯沒有一球員的水平在曼城之上，上季的英超中，他們最終可是落後於曼城19分的。」

　　「利物浦瘋狂消費，引進了史上最貴的後衛和史上最貴的門將，但他們的收購策略卻是很精明的，算上出售古天奴的資金，他們的淨投入只有1.14億英鎊。」

　　「車路士的淨投入為1.68億英鎊，阿仙奴為1.61億英鎊，熱刺只有7600萬英鎊，都遠遠低於曼聯的投入。」

　　「反觀曼聯，摩連奴用創紀錄的8900萬英鎊買下普巴，用7500萬英鎊買下盧卡古，都是大筆消費。而均以超過3000萬英鎊價格買進的拜利、連迪路夫，卻連正選都進不去。然後在看到曼聯的股票下跌後，他又用白菜價賣掉迪比這些球員。」

Laurent Koscielny says he’ll likely leave Arsenal when his current deal expires in June 2020.

The France international will have completed a decade at the Emirates by that point and thinks at 34-years-old it’ll probably be time for a change of scenery.

In the short-term, the centre-back’s main focus is on recovering from the horrific Achilles injury that is set to sideline him for the rest of the year.

“I’m under contract until June 2020. Afterwards? I’m thinking of moving on, but I do not know where,” he told Nice-Matin.

“This is not relevant anyway! I am in England, my family too. Then there will inevitably be a lot of question marks.

“The bottom line is to have health. I learned to relativise because there are so many more serious things in life.”

Unai Emery has confirmed that Koscielny will be one of his club captains this season; no doubt a timely boost for a player who had to watch from the stands as his international teammates secured World Cup glory this summer.

【now.com體育】埃及足總宣佈前墨西哥及馬德里體育會教練艾古里，將執教國家隊，這意味之前被指有意領軍的亨利願望落空。

阿仙奴名宿亨利（Thierry Henry）前一天尚被外界認定有望執教埃及國家隊，取代世界盃後下台的古柏，然而當埃及足總今日公佈人選時，真命天子是曾任教墨西哥及馬德里育會的名帥艾古里（Javier Aguirre），任期為2022年世界盃之後。

前埃及守門員、現為體壇中介人的艾沙耶特日前表示他曾與亨利的代表和埃及足總董事會成員埃曼在倫敦進行會談，若其消息屬實，而埃及足總最終取艾古里而捨亨利，那代表有關方面始終看重經驗。

59歲的艾古里執教過不少名牌球會及國家隊，代表作是率墨西哥參戰2002及2010年世界盃。

LondonFootball記者Charles Watts（跟隊去了新加坡）：

1）如果藍斯未來幾天依然不在阿仙奴給出的一份5年合同上簽字，阿仙奴很可能不得不做出決定將其出售，因為阿仙奴不想再經歷上賽季類似的窘境了（山齊士、奧斯爾），車路士一直在觀察著藍斯的情況。

2）一但決定出售藍斯，阿仙奴很可能引進尼索斯，阿仙奴有信心利用艾美利和尼索斯的關係簽下他。

3）阿仙奴缺少翼側的攻擊球員，鑽石眼一直很希望將丹比利招攬過來，但鑑於其身價太高，租借是唯一可行的選項。藍斯和丹比利進行互換的可能性極低。

4）艾美利需要對Nketiah的使用作出決定，一但他認為Nketiah足以勝任奧巴美羊的替補，阿仙奴將出售韋碧克。韋碧克的合同只剩一年了，阿仙奴目前為止都無意和他續約。
